# Session 08: The Grand Capstone - Master Dashboard

We conclude the bootcamp by building a **Master Control Tower** that brings together everything we've built.

## Business Value
In the high-stakes environment of healthcare, a fragmented AI deployment isn't just inefficient; it's a clinical and operational liability. For **AI for Healthcare** leaders, achieving a unified operational view is paramount. This means having a single pane of glass to continuously monitor the integrity and completeness of patient datasets (data health), the diagnostic precision and throughput of your AI agents in clinical workflows (agent performance), and the real-time compliance and resilience of your systems against threats (security status). Such a consolidated perspective enables proactive intervention, optimizes resource allocation, and ultimately drives superior patient outcomes and organizational efficiency.
## Lab Objectives
1. Build a Streamlit dashboard.
2. Connect it to the outputs of Session 01 and Session 07.
3. Visualize the end-to-end **AI for Healthcare** AI lifecycle.
